title: aldasorea percarnea
side_effects: Aldasorea percarnea can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal distress, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, prolonged use can lead to kidney damage and increased risk of infections. Some individuals may also experience allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing, if they have a pre-existing sensitivity to the plant's compounds. Furthermore, excessive consumption can cause rapid heartbeat, tremors, and other cardiovascular problems, making it essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
